---
applyTo: "css/**/*.css"
---

# CSS Rules

- Always use CSS variables from `base.css`, never hardcode colors or spacing
- Colors: `--primary`, `--primary-light`, `--primary-dark`, `--success`, `--warning`, `--danger`, `--bg`, `--surface`, `--text`, `--text-secondary`
- Spacing scale: `--sp-1` (0.25rem) through `--sp-8` (4rem)
- Font: Inter from Google Fonts
- BEM-lite naming convention
- Mobile-first responsive approach
- Button classes: `.btn`, `.btn-primary`, `.btn-secondary`, `.btn-danger`, `.btn-sm`
- Utility classes: `.hidden`, `.active`, `.disabled`, `.text-center`
